description: Real cardiology consult (Dr. Reddy / patient Suresh / wife Lakshmi). Reference (clean) transcript with correct speaker labels, so scoring isolates LLM extraction from STT/diarization errors. Decision-critical content: PMH (diabetes 8y, HTN, smoking), family history (father bypass @52), investigation values (ST depression, TMT positive, EF 48%, LDL 168, low HDL, high triglycerides, LVH), and a SUSPECTED myocardial ischemia (not confirmed).

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: Namaskaram Suresh garu, please sit down. Mee recent ECG, 2D Echo, Troponin-I, and TMT reports chusanu. What symptoms are you experiencing?

transcript.speaker: speaker_1
transcript.text: Namaste doctor. Last 2 months nunchi chest lo tightness untundi, especially stairs ekkinappudu. Konchem breathlessness kuda vastundi. Sometimes left shoulder varaku pain radiate avutundi.

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: Hmm. Aa pain pressure laga untunda leda sharp ga untunda?

transcript.speaker: speaker_1
transcript.text: Mostly pressure laga untundi doctor. Around 5 to 10 minutes untundi. Rest teesukunte taggipothundi.

transcript.speaker: speaker_2
transcript.text: Doctor, last week night sudden ga sweating kuda vachindi. Chala bayapaddam. Ayana face kuda pale ga ayipoyindi.

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: Excessive sweating during chest discomfort is important. Suresh garu, diabetes, hypertension, leda hyperlipidemia history unda?

transcript.speaker: speaker_1
transcript.text: Avunu doctor. Naaku 8 years nunchi diabetes undi. BP medicines kuda vadutunnanu.

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: Smoking history unda?

transcript.speaker: speaker_1
transcript.text: Earlier daily one pack smoke chesevadu. Last year nunchi reduce chesanu kani completely stop cheyyaledu.

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: Okay. Mee ECG lo mild ST-segment depression kanipinchindi. TMT positive vachindi, which suggests myocardial ischemia possibility.

transcript.speaker: speaker_1
transcript.text: Doctor, myocardial ischemia ante exact ga enti?

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: Simple ga cheppali ante, heart muscle ki blood supply adequate ga reach avvakapovadam. Usually coronary arteries lo atherosclerotic plaque buildup valla ila jarugutundi.

transcript.speaker: speaker_2
transcript.text: Ante heart attack vachinatte na doctor?

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: Not necessarily. Heart attack, medically myocardial infarction, occurs when blood flow severely or completely blocks. Ischemia is more like a warning sign.

transcript.speaker: speaker_1
transcript.text: Echo report lo 'Left Ventricular Hypertrophy' ani undi. Adi dangerous aa?

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: Left Ventricular Hypertrophy, or LVH, ante heart left ventricle wall thick avvadam. Long-standing hypertension valla idi develop avvachu.

transcript.speaker: speaker_1
transcript.text: Adi reverse avutunda doctor?

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: BP proper ga control chesthe progression slow cheyyachu. Konni cases lo improvement kuda untundi.

transcript.speaker: speaker_2
transcript.text: Doctor, report lo ejection fraction 48% ani undi. Normal enti?

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: Normal ejection fraction usually 55% to 70% madhya untundi. Mee husband di slightly reduced. Severe kaadu kani monitor cheyyali.

transcript.speaker: speaker_1
transcript.text: Nenu morning walk chestanu. Kani recent ga 500 meters nadichina taruvata fatigue vastundi.

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: That correlates with reduced exercise tolerance. We need to investigate coronary artery disease further.

transcript.speaker: speaker_1
transcript.text: Angiography avasaram aa doctor?

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: Considering your symptoms, positive stress test, diabetes, and family history, coronary angiography is strongly recommended.

transcript.speaker: speaker_2
transcript.text: Angiography dangerous procedure aa?

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: Very low risk procedure. We insert a catheter through radial artery or femoral artery and visualize coronary circulation using contrast dye.

transcript.speaker: speaker_1
transcript.text: Blockages unte next step enti?

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: Depends on severity. Mild lesions medication tho manage cheyyachu. Significant stenosis unte angioplasty with stent placement or sometimes coronary artery bypass grafting, CABG, recommend chestam.

transcript.speaker: speaker_1
transcript.text: Na father ki 52 years age lo bypass surgery ayyindi doctor.

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: Family history is another significant cardiovascular risk factor.

transcript.speaker: speaker_2
transcript.text: Cholesterol reports ela unnayi doctor?

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: LDL cholesterol 168 mg/dL undi, which is elevated. Triglycerides kuda high unnayi. HDL matram takkuva undi.

transcript.speaker: speaker_1
transcript.text: Ante medicines start cheyyala?

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: Yes. High-intensity statin therapy recommend chestanu. Along with antiplatelet medication and optimization of diabetes management.

transcript.speaker: speaker_1
transcript.text: Salt tagginchala?

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: Definitely. Low sodium diet, Mediterranean-style nutrition, regular aerobic activity, smoking cessation, and weight reduction are crucial.

transcript.speaker: speaker_2
transcript.text: Doctor, konni rojulu ga ayana heartbeat fast ga anipistundi ani cheptunnaru.

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: Palpitations unnaya?

transcript.speaker: speaker_1
transcript.text: Avunu. Especially night time lo. Heart skip ayinattu feel avutundi.

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: We should perform a 24-hour Holter monitoring study to evaluate for arrhythmias such as atrial fibrillation, supraventricular tachycardia, or premature ventricular contractions.

transcript.speaker: speaker_1
transcript.text: Arrhythmia dangerous aa doctor?

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: Some arrhythmias harmless untayi. Kani konni stroke risk leda sudden cardiac complications ki lead avvachu, so proper evaluation important.

transcript.speaker: speaker_2
transcript.text: Emergency signs enti doctor?

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: Severe chest pain lasting more than 15 minutes, pain radiating to jaw or left arm, profuse sweating, dizziness, syncope, or severe breathlessness unte immediately emergency department ki vellandi.

transcript.speaker: speaker_1
transcript.text: Okay doctor. Konchem tension ga undi.

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: Understandable. Kani good news enti ante symptoms ni early stage lo identify chesam. Proper treatment and lifestyle changes follow ayithe prognosis generally favorable untundi.

transcript.speaker: speaker_1
transcript.text: Thank you doctor.

transcript.speaker: speaker_2
transcript.text: Thank you doctor garu.

transcript.speaker: speaker_0
transcript.text: You're welcome. Angiography schedule cheddam, and meanwhile medicines regular ga continue cheyyandi.
